description.value:
A natural weapon attack using the creature's horns or antlers. Damage values are determined by the creature's stat block; RME properties apply on top of the creature's base attack.

Basic: Natural, Melee, Brace, Punch, Puncture, Sunder

rmeData.masterPerk: When you move at least 20 feet in a straight line toward your target, you can make one melee attack with your horns as a bonus action. If this attack hits, your weapon damage dice is doubled.
